_doc: Layer inventory for the diversity atlas. Round-1 is intentionally empty: every page reads the bulk embedded_tables.json snapshot via atlases/diversity/shared/data_loader.js, not via the layer-router. When the atlas grows beyond the MODULE_3 snapshot (per-sample θπ tracks, kinship matrix, ngsF-HMM per-window calls, ...), those data products should be registered as layers here on a per-page basis — see KICKOFF_diversity_atlas.md Q4 for the lazy-promotion strategy.

_tier_legend.hot: RAM-pinned at trigger event; pages read state directly; <1ms
_tier_legend.warm: IndexedDB-cached at trigger event; first read async ~50ms; subsequent ~10ms
